short_summary: Ukraine gains, Black Sea watch continues
rationale: Ukraine's territorial reclaiming and logistics strikes are a continuation of last cycle's uptick — positive for Romanian Black Sea security but no new qualitative shift.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Continued Ukrainian advances reduce pressure on the Black Sea region near Romania, but this mirrors last cycle's development — no fresh escalation or new threat vector.

top_events.title: Trump-Iran deal dispute escalates publicly
top_events.summary: Ongoing Iran-US nuclear stalemate keeps energy market uncertainty alive, with mild indirect effect on Romanian energy import costs.

top_events.title: SpaceX IPO debuts on US markets
top_events.summary: Large capital market event; limited direct impact on Romania but may affect EU investor sentiment and Romanian market exposure.
